creator: charnier@xp11.frmug.org
text:
There is IMHO a confusion between NOOBJDIR and NOOBJ.

Fix: Here is the fix, note that as I was here, I added some cosmetic 
	changes in the first part of the patch.
How-To-Repeat: 
	
	Run `make world' with NOOBJDIR (aka  do not run ``${MAKE} obj'') 
	defined in your /etc/make.conf.
